headline: Oppenheimer Remains Bullish on A. O. Smith (AOS) Despite Near-Term Demand Challenges
summary: A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS) is included among the Top 10 Income Stocks with the Highest Upside Potential. On June 10, Oppenheimer lowered its price recommendation on A. O. Smith Corporation (NYSE:AOS) to $75 from $80. It reiterated an Outperform rating on the stock. The firm recently hosted an investor group at A.O. Smith’s headquarters, […]
